zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Boyd, Duchess of Albany於大約1429年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾時，她的父親Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock25歲，母親Isabell Lyle35歲。她於大約1445年與Andrew Stewart結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland: 苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Boyd, Duchess of Albany于大约1429年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾时，她的父亲Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock25岁，母亲Isabell Lyle35岁。她于大约1445年与Andrew Stewart结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Boyd,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the island of Bute in the Firth of Clyde, from Bòid (genitive case of Bòd, the Gaelic name of the island of Bute) or Bòideach, denoting a person from Bute. Alternatively, the name may denote descendants of a Gilla filius Boed, who appears in reference to Glasgow Cathedral in the early 12th century, perhaps from the Gaelic personal name Boite, of uncertain origin.
Scottish and Irish: from the Gaelic epithet buidhe ‘yellow(-haired)’. Compare Bowie .
Manx: from Mac Gille Buidhe ‘son of the yellow-haired lad’ (compare 2 above).

variants.name: Bowie
meanings: Scottish: from Gaelic buidhe ‘yellow’, i.e. ‘yellow-haired’, pronounced as two syllables. The equivalent term in Ireland is buí, often Anglicized as boy. The surname may also be a shortened form of Gilboy .
Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Buadhaigh (see Bogue ).

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Boyd, Duchess of Albany was born about 1429, in Renfrewshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock, was 25 and her mother, Isabell Lyle, was 35. She married Andrew Stewart about 1445. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Boyd, Duchess of Albany est née environ 1429, à Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Isabell Lyle, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Andrew Stewart environ 1445. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Boyd, Duchess of Albany um 1429 in Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock 25 und ihre Mutter Isabell Lyle 35. Sie hat um 1445 Andrew Stewart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Boyd, Duchess of Albany è nata il circa 1429 nel Renfrewshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Isabell Lyle, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Andrew Stewart circa 1445. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Boyd, Duchess of Albanyが約1429年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnockは25歳，母Isabell Lyleは35歳であった。約1445年にAndrew Stewartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Boyd, Duchess of Albany(이)가 대략 1429년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabell Lyle(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1445년 Andrew Stewart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

mn.Morphie, Kincardineshire, Scotland: A' Mhaoirne, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Boyd, Duchess of Albany nasceu aproximadamente 1429, em Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Isabell Lyle, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Andrew Stewart aproximadamente 1445. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Boyd, Duchess of Albany родилась около 1429 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabell Lyle, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Andrew Stewart около 1445 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Boyd, Duchess of Albany nació aproximadamente 1429, en Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Isabell Lyle, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Andrew Stewart aproximadamente 1445. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas.
